nodes.label: AI as time-saving tool for low-value tasks
nodes.grounding_span: things that would take far to long other wise and wouldn't add enough value to be worth it

nodes.grounding_span: check if the tone of my work is what I think it it

nodes.label: AI reliability and accuracy

nodes.label: AI environmental impact
nodes.grounding_span: I also do worry about the impact of AI on the environment

nodes.label: AI as final polishing tool

nodes.label: AI as tool augmenting human skills
nodes.grounding_span: AI will never be infallible in our lifetime. It's a tool to me like a computer was

nodes.label: AI ethical use and energy efficiency
nodes.grounding_span: able to run on less energy like most tech does as it grows it will become more viable for me to use it in an ethical way

nodes.label: Work efficiency and value
